title: <div>Submits required number of response posts; Some connections are made with r
content:
Submits required number of response posts; Some connections are made with relevant explanation and detail.
10 to >0 pts
Needs Improvement
Responses are not submitted; Responses are generic, limited, do not extend the discussion or add detail.
30 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomePeer Responses: Timeliness
10 pts
Excellent
Submits peer response posts by deadline.
0 pts
Satisfactory
Submits peer response posts late.
10 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomePeer Responses: Spelling/Grammar/Mechanics
10 pts
Excellent
Posts have 0-1 spelling or grammatical errors; Properly cites work in APA format where required.
5 pts
Satisfactory
Posts have 2-3 spelling or grammatical errors; Cites work in APA format where required with few errors.
0 pts
Needs Improvement
Posts have 4 or more spelling or grammatical errors; Does not cite work where required.
10 pts
Total Points: 100  Week 1 | Assignment: Narrative Essay - Prewriting
